title: benthamantha edwardsii
side_effects: Benthamantha edwardsii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high alkaloid content. In some cases, excessive consumption may lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. Additionally, improper use of the plant may result in allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues like coughing and difficulty breathing. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using Benthamantha edwardsii for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
